My Projects

Super Store Sales Dashboard

A multi-page Power BI dashboard analyzing $2.3M in retail sales across 4 years, covering regional performance, product categories, customer insights, and shipping analytics.

Power BI Sales Analytics Dashboard Data Visualization

Influencer Marketing Campaigns Dashboard

An Excel dashboard tracking 2,191 influencer campaigns (2022–2027) across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and Twitter, revealing platform ROI, engagement rates, and category-level sales performance.

Excel Marketing Analytics Dashboard KPI Tracking

E-Commerce Sales Dashboard (2024–2025)

An Excel dashboard monitoring $1.4M in Egyptian e-commerce sales, breaking down performance by product category, region, payment method, and sales channel with monthly trend analysis.

Excel E-Commerce Sales Analysis Dashboard

CS Bikes Sales Dashboard (2016–2017)

An Excel dashboard visualizing $4.26M in bike sales across 7 Egyptian regions, highlighting top products, sales rep performance, monthly trends, and customer segment distribution.

Excel Sales Analytics Regional Analysis Dashboard
